title: Career Opportunity Category Manager at Voylla Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Category Manager at Voylla Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Voylla Ventures Solutions! We are hiring a Category Manager for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Voylla Ventures Solutions:
Voylla Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voylla Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
